steps.prompt:
Weekly Google AI ecosystem scan. Check these sources:

1. **Gemini Models**: Search for new Gemini model releases, capability updates, context window changes, pricing. Check ai.google.dev docs.
2. **SDKs**: Check PyPI google-genai and google-adk versions. Look for new features, breaking changes.
3. **Gemini API**: Search for Gemini API changelog — new endpoints, tools, function calling updates, grounding.
4. **Google ADK**: Check github.com/google/adk-python for releases, new agent patterns.
5. **AI Studio / Vertex**: Major feature additions relevant to API users (not enterprise-only).
6. **Google AI blog**: Search for recent Google AI announcements.

No existing baseline memo — create one if significant findings.

Write delta to .claude/plans/vendor-google-delta.md with sections: ## New Releases, ## Model Updates, ## API Changes, ## SDK Changes, ## Handoff.

Read .claude/plans/vendor-google-delta.md — focus on ## Handoff.

Assess relevance to our infrastructure: (1) model-review and model-guide skills use Gemini — any capability changes? (2) llmx routes to Gemini — any API changes? (3) code-review-scout uses Gemini free tier — still available? (4) any new features that affect multi-model routing?

If significant findings, create or update meta/research/google-ai-landscape.md.
Write actionable items to .claude/plans/vendor-google-actions.md.
Commit any research docs with [vendor-scan] prefix.
